---
title: "John Spencer Curwen"
---

## John Spencer Curwen

**Dates:** (1847-1916)

### Description

editor of the <i>Musical Herald</i>

### Biography

He was the son of John Curwen (1816-1880), who had popularized the use of the tonic sol-fa method of teaching singing.

### Letters

- Letter from <i>June</i> 17<i>th</i>, 1896.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
